summary: Lead accepts M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001 after gameplay_designer REVIEW and systems_architect ACCEPT. The task remains planning-only, defines the bounded M6 Alpha start-to-victory contract, preserves DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE and Human Gates, and changes only allowed process/task/status/message files.

tests_run.result: Task schema valid before lead ACCEPT update; final validation is run after this handoff is written.
M6 task graph state reviewed; downstream M6 tasks remain DRAFT before this task is integrated.
No READY tasks while M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001 is in review/accepted workflow.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001
tests_run.result: Contract contains required sections, 8 player decisions with advantage/cost/dependencies/counter, Human Gate false, and DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE preserved.

decisions: ACCEPT: M6 Alpha victory is a recognized-order condition, not map painting.
ACCEPT: Contract maps accepted M1-M5 systems to the M6 DAG without adding product code or content-source data.
ACCEPT: DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE remains deferred and non-blocking for M6/M7/M8.
ACCEPT: Human Gate list remains active and no new Human Gate is required for this task.
Proceed to PR integration; task becomes CLOSED only after accepted changes enter main.
risks: Untracked ui-samples/ exists and is unrelated to this task; it is intentionally unstaged and untouched.
Downstream M6 implementation tasks must honor this contract without expanding into M7/M8 or post-1.0 scope.
requested_action: Open PR, wait for CI, merge to main, sync main, then mark M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001 CLOSED and start the next READY M6 task.
